audit_items.proof_trace: Gossip path validates index range before KZG verification (L480→L535). RPC path performs KZG verification without index validation (L247-249), then silently filters invalid indices (L261). This allows attackers to force expensive KZG operations on invalid data without penalty.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Malicious peer sends DataColumnsByRoot responses with index >= 128. Node performs costly KZG verification before filtering. Attacker repeats to exhaust CPU resources. No peer penalty applied since validation succeeds but columns are silently dropped.
